ks)\n3. The SDK correctly marks the tool call as `invalid: true` and generates a `tool-error`\n4. On the next step, the API rejects with: `\"The format of the value at messages.X.content.Y.toolUse.input is invalid. Provide a json object for the field and try again.\"`\n\n## Suggested Fix\n\nIn `parse-tool-call.ts`, wrap the fallback input in an object:\n\n```diff\n- const input = parsedInput.success ? parsedInput.value : toolCall.input;\n+ const input = parsedInput.success ? parsedInput.value : { rawInvalidInput: toolCall.input };\n```\n\n## Environment\n\n- `ai` version: 6.0.48\n- Provider: `@ai-sdk/amazon-bedrock`\n- Model: Claude (Anthropic via Bedrock)",

content.text: 还是被截断了，我用命令行来获取精简信息：

input.command:
curl -s "https://api.github.com/search/issues?q=repo:vercel/ai+type:issue+state:open&sort=updated&order=desc&per_page=10" | python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
print(f'总共 {data[\"total_count\"]} 个开放 Issues')
print()
for item in data['items']:
    labels = ', '.join([l['name'] for l in item['labels']]) if item['labels'] else '无标签'
    print(f'#{item[\"number\"]} | {item[\"title\"]}')
    print(f'    作者: {item[\"user\"][\"login\"]} | 评论: {item[\"comments\"]} | 标签: {labels}')
    print(f'    {item[\"html_url\"]}')
    print()
"
